ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp for the reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor that took the reading */,
  "no_ppm" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen oxides in ppm */,
  "co_ppm" REAL /* Concentration of carbon monoxide in ppm */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "battery" REAL /* Battery level percentage of the sensor */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Data quality flag (e.g., good, bad, questionable) */,
  "calibration_status" INTEGER /* Calibration status of the sensor (true/false) */,
  "maintenance_status" INTEGER /* Maintenance status of the sensor (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., NO sensor, CO sensor) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Installation date of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor whose data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of sensor */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "aggregated_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor for which readings are aggregated */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp for the aggregated reading */,
  "avg_no_ppm" REAL /* Average concentration of NO in ppm */,
  "avg_co_ppm" REAL /* Average concentration of CO in ppm */,
  "avg_temp_c" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "avg_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregated_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high pollution, low battery) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_action" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance was performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading being assessed */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the reading (e.g., good, bad, questionable) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality assessment */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who performed the quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)
